mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, p.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, p.PRODUCT_DESC AS productDesc, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM PRODUCTS p LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE p.SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_NO DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRANSACTIONS WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, p.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM WISHLIST w JOIN PRODUCTS p ON w.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE w.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_NO DESC

SELECT ACCOUNT_ID AS accountId, EMAIL AS email, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCOUNT_NUM AS accountNum, ACCOUNT_HOLDER AS accountHolder, IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY IS_PRIMARY DESC, ACCOUNT_ID ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNTS (ACCOUNT_ID, EMAIL, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NUM, ACCOUNT_HOLDER, IS_PRIMARY) VALUES (SEQ_ACCOUNT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{email}, #{bankName}, #{accountNum}, #{accountHolder}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ACCOUNTS WHERE ACCOUNT_ID = #{accountId} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT DELIVERY_NO AS deliveryNo, MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail, LABEL AS label, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, RECEIVER_PHONE AS receiverPhone, POSTCODE AS postcode, ADDRESS AS address, DETAILADDRESS AS detailAddress, EXTRAADDRESS AS extraAddress, IS_PRIMARY AS isPrimary FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY IS_PRIMARY DESC, DELIVERY_NO ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY_ADDRESS (DELIVERY_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, LABEL, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_PHONE, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, DETAILADDRESS, EXTRAADDRESS, IS_PRIMARY) VALUES (SEQ_DELIVERY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{label}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{extraAddress}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.update: UPDATE DELIVERY_ADDRESS SET LABEL = #{label}, RECEIVER_NAME = #{receiverName}, RECEIVER_PHONE = #{receiverPhone}, POSTCODE = #{postcode}, ADDRESS = #{address}, DETAILADDRESS = #{detailAddress}, EXTRAADDRESS = #{extraAddress} WHERE DELIVERY_NO = #{deliveryNo} AND MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DELIVERY_ADDRESS WHERE DELIVERY_NO = #{deliveryNo} AND MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, p.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, t.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, TO_CHAR(t.TRADE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS tradeDate, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM TRANSACTIONS t JOIN PRODUCTS p ON t.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE t.BUYER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY t.TRADE_DATE DESC

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS reportId, r.REPORT_DETAIL AS reportDetail, r.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, TO_CHAR(r.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reportDate, rt.TYPE_NAME AS typeName, rt.MAIN_CATEGORY AS mainCategory, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM REPORTS r LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPES rt ON r.TYPE_ID = rt.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_NUM = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE r.REPORTER_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.REPORT_DATE DESC

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS reportId, r.REPORT_DETAIL AS reportDetail, r.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, TO_CHAR(r.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reportDate, rt.TYPE_NAME AS typeName, rt.MAIN_CATEGORY AS mainCategory, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, pi.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM REPORTS r LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPES rt ON r.TYPE_ID = rt.TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN PRODUCTS p ON r.PRODUCT_NUM = p.PRODUCT_NO LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRODUCT_NO = p.PRODUCT_NO AND pi.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE r.TARGET_EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY r.REPORT_DATE DESC
